sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INTEGER, text_field VARCHAR, value_field INTEGER);
SELECT lpad(text_field, (value_field >> 1), '>') AS padded_text FROM test_table WHERE value_field IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, lpad(text_field, 5, '-') AS result FROM test_table WHERE (value_field >> 2) > 2;
SELECT id, lpad(text_field, 10, '!') AS padded_text, (value_field >> 1) AS shifted_value FROM test_table WHERE text_field <> '' ORDER BY padded_text;
CREATE TABLE secondary_table (key_value INTEGER, description VARCHAR);
SELECT lpad(t.text_field, t.value_field, '>') AS padded, s.description FROM test_table t JOIN secondary_table s ON t.id = (s.key_value >> 1) WHERE s.description IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, lpad(text_field, value_field + 2, '~') AS complex_padding FROM test_table GROUP BY lpad(text_field, value_field, '0');
SELECT id, lpad(text_field, MAX(value_field) >> 1, '%') AS result FROM test_table GROUP BY text_field HAVING COUNT(value_field) > 1;
SELECT id, lpad(text_field, 9, '-') AS resultant, (value_field >> 3) FROM test_table WHERE (lpad(text_field, 5, '.') IS NOT NULL);
